column1: We always go to the Russian Museum on ... Sunday.
On ... Saturday she usually goes to the Philharmonic.
He goes to ... school in the morning.
He has five or six ... lessons every day.
He usually goes to ... bed at half past ten.
I get up at ... half past seven in the morning.
When does your mother leave ... home for work?
I leave home for ... school at half past eight.
What do you do when you come ... home from school?
